item.title: Entitled Karen gets dragged in the comments
item.description: The comments on her post absolutely dragged her for not understanding that she is not entitled to the parking space behind her and that that she should pull forward into parking spaces instead of backing into them if she is going to need to open the back up to load groceries into her vehicle.
item.dc:creator: SquirrelWithATophat

item.title: Retired Major General Randy Manner: "Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth is not connected to reality... Trump has started more wars than any president in our lifetime... what victory? Hegseth is a clear and present danger to the United States"
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: OC Celebrating Space and the Artemis Crew With This Awesome Dress
item.description:
I've never worn it and it is super tight on me. Almost busted the zipper
Has pockets. So dang tight though -.-
Just gotta lose 10lbs or so and it will be perfect. I love space and this dress. Since some have wondered, no the mark on my chest isn't cancerous or a mole. It's a scar from when I had a loop recorder for my heart. I have health problems and don't heal well. Sorry it's unsightly. Have a nice weekend everyone.
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat

item.title: Meme Redistribution Centre TM
item.dc:creator: HuskyHairExtraordinaire

item.title: Truck’s brakes fail, forcing use of runaway ramp at 90 mph
item.dc:creator: smartguy1337

item.title: Steven Madow captured this awesome close-up shot of Artemis ll engine, using a Panasonic GH5 and a Lumix G Leica 50-200mm f/2.8-4 lens. This photo was captured at 1/8000s, f/16, and ISO 100.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Genuine story reveled behind the massive repost of bullshit like "racist man wants blacks to leave neighborhood"
item.description:
Saw this making its rounds here with some real loser titles and misinformation. Thought I'd post what I had and clear it up. Man had nothing to do with the home owners and (obviously) was suffering severe mental issues. He said he could hear people inside the house screaming so he approached. He even made his way into the house
The owner of the home was communicating through ring and was already racing home. He popped the intruder in the head with a shovel and de escalated the situation until police arrived and took the invader away
item.dc:creator: CriminallyMysophobic

item.title: Imagine if men could do this... No one would be safe

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @DevineEscapes built this birdbath. Great work! Check out more stuff they've built in their posts.
27 Man Tax: Tom Hanks
“If you go looking for a friend, you’re going to find they’re very scarce. If you go out to be a friend, you’ll find them everywhere.” - Zig Ziglar So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Saturday Brushing
item.description: Whenever I brush my hair, Frank demands that I use the same brush on him. Frank is kind of silly.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Took me over a decade to get this Etch A Sketch
item.description: I recently traveled to NYC for the express purpose of picking up this beauty in person! This hunt lasted over a decade and I'm nothing short of gobsmacked that I get to lovingly caress it whenever I want. I'm working on a longform deepdive video where I've been meticulously compiling every nugget of knowledge I can learn about these special limited edition Etch A Sketches. I expect the video will take a while because it's such a huge undertaking. This is a dream come true I'm so happy!!!
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: The class war is coming
item.description:
https://www.gbnews.com/news/world/us-military-plane-damaged-shannon-airport-break-in
We’re getting there
No war but class war means waging war on the machines of death used to divide us.
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: It's time for TheFreePizzaDude!
item.description:
I had to leave last week's post early for work, my apologies. Let's make up for it today If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been such a huge help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
Puckett is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 240 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 320 5th, 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @pot314 330 8th, 9th, 10th and 11th by @OP 342 12th, 13th, 14th and 15th by @OP 400 16th and 17th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 430 18th and 19th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 500 20th and 21st by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 600 22nd, Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant and 25th by @OP 730 26th by Pizza Angel @grandopening ... Today's Grocery Tally 230 1st by Grocery Angel @pot314 400 2nd by Grocery Angel @pot314 500 3rd by Grocery Angel @pot314 515 4th by Grocery Angel @AyatollahBahloni 700 5th by Grocery Angel @pot314
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Caturday
item.description: Bonus Sunbeam Frank mlem.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Eighteen weeks without any selfharm
item.description: This has been the worst week in a while, and i have been kinda very close to just abandon this project. Loads of anxiety, several rock bottoms, some breakdowns, disappointments. Just a hell kind of week, in every way possible. But i avtually kept clean, and i feel like im through the worst now. I feel i can safely celebrate 18 weeks now.
item.dc:creator: dotnote

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1666 (geese regime change)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
No no, I'm listening. I may not agree with you, but I'm listening.
You're welcome.
Yah, I know it's the spacing guild. Yeah, I know I posted this meme before. But damn, they look snazzy AF.
I saw my first-of-year Scott's Oriole yesterday. Also I think I saw a Nashville Warbler, but I didnt get a good enough look to confirm.
I have eBird and Merlin.
Farya Faraji did a banger version of the absolute Catullus Classic, poem 16. https://youtu.be/4N8IPz_J5Hg?si=XM1Ovv0s29dY6AF Yeah. *That* one.
This tracks with how swifts fly.
Sorry for the poor cropping today guys, I'm in a hurry and woke up later than I wanted.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
